Parameter.Description: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: New MetaDocs workspace to create.
Parameter.Name: new-workspace

Parameter.Description: Stable documentation subject id.
Parameter.Name: id

Parameter.Description: Page title and subject display name.
Parameter.Name: title

Parameter.Description: Short subject summary.
Parameter.Name: summary

Parameter.Description: Authored narrative body.
Parameter.Name: body

Parameter.Description: Optional subject kind. Default: Guide.
Parameter.Name: kind

Parameter.Description: Optional display path. Default: title.
Parameter.Name: path

Parameter.Description: Optional parent subject id.
Parameter.Name: parent

Parameter.Description: Set this page as the default documentation view root.
Parameter.Name: view-root

Parameter.Description: Optional narrative slot. Default: Summary.
Parameter.Name: slot

Parameter.Description: Optional authored documentation source id.
Parameter.Name: source-id

Parameter.Description: Optional authored documentation source display name.
Parameter.Name: source-name

Parameter.Description: Documentation path to browse, for example cli/meta-sql/deploy.
Parameter.Name: path

Parameter.Description: MetaDocs workspace to browse. Defaults to the current directory.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: MetaDocs workspace to list. Defaults to the current directory.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: Optional documentation view id, name, or title.
Parameter.Name: view

Parameter.Description: Maximum tree depth. Default: 4.
Parameter.Name: depth

Parameter.Description: Search text.
Parameter.Name: query

Parameter.Description: MetaDocs workspace to search. Defaults to the current directory.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: Optional subject kind filter.
Parameter.Name: kind

Parameter.Description: Maximum number of matches. Default: 25.
Parameter.Name: limit

Parameter.Description: MetaDocs workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: Documentation subject id or key.
Parameter.Name: subject

Parameter.Description: Model name.
Parameter.Name: model

Parameter.Description: CLI application name.
Parameter.Name: cli

Parameter.Description: CLI command name or path.
Parameter.Name: command

Parameter.Description: CLI option token.
Parameter.Name: option

Parameter.Description: Description slot to add or update. Default: Summary.
Parameter.Name: slot

Parameter.Description: Optional description title. Defaults to the slot.
Parameter.Name: title

Parameter.Description: Authored description body.
Parameter.Name: body

Parameter.Description: Read authored description body from standard input.
Parameter.Name: body-stdin

Parameter.Description: Body format. Default: PlainText.
Parameter.Name: body-format

Parameter.Description: Source MetaCli workspace to refresh reference documentation from.
Parameter.Name: source-workspace

Parameter.Description: Existing MetaDocs source workspace to refresh in place.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: New MetaDocs source workspace to create.
Parameter.Name: new-workspace

Parameter.Description: Optional MetaCli application id when the source workspace contains more than one application.
Parameter.Name: application

Parameter.Description: Optional parent subject id for the imported CLI application.
Parameter.Name: parent-subject

Parameter.Description: Stable documentation source id. Keep it fixed so authored descriptions stay attached.
Parameter.Name: source-id

Parameter.Description: Source Meta workspace to refresh model reference documentation from.
Parameter.Name: source-workspace

Parameter.Description: Existing MetaDocs source workspace to refresh in place.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: New MetaDocs source workspace to create.
Parameter.Name: new-workspace

Parameter.Description: Stable documentation source id. Keep it fixed so authored descriptions stay attached.
Parameter.Name: source-id

Parameter.Description: Optional parent subject id for the imported model subject.
Parameter.Name: parent-subject

Parameter.Description: Optional source display name.
Parameter.Name: display-name

Parameter.Description: Source Meta workspace whose allowed instances should be documented.
Parameter.Name: source-workspace

Parameter.Description: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place. Defaults to the current directory.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: Optional stable documentation source id for imported instance docs.
Parameter.Name: source-id

Parameter.Description: Optional source id used by import-workspace-model, for linking instance docs to model docs.
Parameter.Name: model-source-id

Parameter.Description: Optional source display name.
Parameter.Name: display-name

Parameter.Description: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place. Defaults to the current directory.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: Source workspace entity name to include.
Parameter.Name: entity

Parameter.Description: Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.
Parameter.Name: source-id

Parameter.Description: Optional property used only as the imported instance display name.
Parameter.Name: display-name-property

Parameter.Description: Optional property used only as the imported instance summary.
Parameter.Name: summary-property

Parameter.Description: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place. Defaults to the current directory.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: Source workspace entity name.
Parameter.Name: entity

Parameter.Description: Property name to import as a generated fact.
Parameter.Name: property

Parameter.Description: Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.
Parameter.Name: source-id

Parameter.Description: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place. Defaults to the current directory.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: Source workspace entity name.
Parameter.Name: entity

Parameter.Description: Relationship selector, navigation name, or relationship column name.
Parameter.Name: relationship

Parameter.Description: Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.
Parameter.Name: source-id

Parameter.Description: Source MetaDocs workspace to include. Repeat for many workspaces.
Parameter.Name: include

Parameter.Description: Suite workspace to rebuild. Defaults to the current directory.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: MetaDocs workspace to validate. Defaults to the current directory.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: Treat warnings as failing diagnostics.
Parameter.Name: warnings-as-errors

Parameter.Description: Include description authoring diagnostics.
Parameter.Name: include-description-diagnostics

Parameter.Description: MetaDocs workspace to render. Defaults to the current directory.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: Output directory. The merged page is written as docs.html.
Parameter.Name: out

Parameter.Description: MetaDocs workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: Documentation subject id or key.
Parameter.Name: subject

Parameter.Description: Model name.
Parameter.Name: model

Parameter.Description: CLI application name.
Parameter.Name: cli

Parameter.Description: CLI command name or path.
Parameter.Name: command

Parameter.Description: CLI option token.
Parameter.Name: option

Parameter.Description: Stable example id.
Parameter.Name: id

Parameter.Description: Example title.
Parameter.Name: title

Parameter.Description: Optional short example summary.
Parameter.Name: summary

Parameter.Description: Stable id for the first example section.
Parameter.Name: section-id

Parameter.Description: First example section text.
Parameter.Name: body

Parameter.Description: Read the first example section text from standard input.
Parameter.Name: body-stdin

Parameter.Description: Body format. Default: PlainText.
Parameter.Name: body-format

Parameter.Description: Previous example id for ordered examples on the same subject.
Parameter.Name: previous-example

Parameter.Description: MetaDocs workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: Example id.
Parameter.Name: example

Parameter.Description: Optional section title.
Parameter.Name: title

Parameter.Description: Example section text.
Parameter.Name: body

Parameter.Description: Read example section text from standard input.
Parameter.Name: body-stdin

Parameter.Description: Body format. Default: PlainText.
Parameter.Name: body-format

Parameter.Description: Previous section id for ordered sections in the same example.
Parameter.Name: previous-section

Parameter.Description: MetaDocs workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: Example section id.
Parameter.Name: section

Parameter.Description: Stable code block id.
Parameter.Name: id

Parameter.Description: Optional code block title.
Parameter.Name: title

Parameter.Description: Code language label.
Parameter.Name: language

Parameter.Description: Code text.
Parameter.Name: code

Parameter.Description: Read code text from standard input.
Parameter.Name: code-stdin

Parameter.Description: Previous code block id for ordered code in the same section.
Parameter.Name: previous-code

Parameter.Description: Stable section id.
Parameter.Name: id
